title: Non-record: Whole-Model GTA Megakernel Draft + Manual CUDA Reverse Pass
author: greqone

data.description: GTA attention variant with grouped-query style tied key/value projections and separate query/key rope dimensions.
Applies RoPE only to the last 32 query/key dimensions.
Standalone whole-model CUDA path with inline extension for forward, eval, and backward over packed runtime buffers.
Manual reverse pass over packed buffers with cuBLAS-backed projections.
Deterministic named tensor views for state_dict, checkpointing, and int8 export.

novel_contributions: Standalone non-record draft for a whole-model GTA megakernel direction
Single-file packed-GTA trainer with inline CUDA extension
Whole-model forward/eval path backed by cuBLAS
Deterministic named tensor views for checkpointing and export
Local RTX 4090 benchmark and validation logs
